description:
Is your science knowledge still up to date?

“You learned it at school.”
“You kind of remember it.”
But knowledge like that can often become surprisingly vague over time.

This game is a science knowledge quiz
based on the science and natural phenomena around us.

Space, the human body, matter, and energy.
Using everyday questions and basic science concepts,
you’ll face quizzes about scientific knowledge you think you know.

How to play is simple.
• Read the question
• Choose an answer by intuition
• Check the result and explanation instantly

Even when you get it right, there’s more to learn.
Even when you get it wrong, you’ll discover something new.

Play a single question anytime.
Perfect for passing time or refreshing your knowledge.

How much of your scientific knowledge still holds up today?
Why not put it to the test?

The game supports both button controls and touch controls, allowing you to play in TV mode, handheld mode, or tabletop mode.
※This game is designed to be played on the Nintendo Switch™ in vertical orientation.
